title: Witch's Return
overview: Morihito Otogi is a teenager with ogre strength. His childhood friend, Nico, is coming home after completing her witch training! Following an old pact, they begin living together. Can Morihito protect the clumsy Nico from a dire prophecy?

title: A Giant Rookie / Let's Go to a Diner / The Flying Classroom
overview: On the first day of school, Morihito urges Nico to hide the fact that she's a witch, but she tries using magic to secretly help him out in class.

title: Fresh Transparent Fashions for Spring / Witch's Delivery Service / Lost Dogs and the Patter of Rain
overview: Nico's mother sends Morihito a letter containing a worrying prophecy. Unable to decipher the meaning, Morihito spends the rest of the day on his toes.

title: Kanshi Kazamatsuri, the Tengu
overview: Kanshi explains that Nico's mother sent him to protect her. He and Morihito clash, but he takes a moment to warn him of an enemy within the school.

title: My Student Is My Favorite Artist / My Tummy Is Tender Today / Cat Scout
overview: Closet manga fan Ms. Makuwa loses her composure when she realizes that one of her students is a popular fan artist for her favorite series.

title: Under the Lovers' Tree
overview: After realizing Morihito is getting popular with the girls at school, Nico learns of a so-called lovers' tree near the site of an upcoming field trip.

title: Kan and Nico's Channel / The Tea Ceremony Is a Piece of Tea Cake
overview: Nico and Kanshi start an online video channel, but Morihito is annoyed by their lack of originality and asks their hipster classmate Magami for help.

title: Kanshi’s Part-Time Job Diaries ~The Superhero Show~ / Kanshi’s Part-Time Job Diaries ~The Side Job~
overview: When Kanshi can’t pay his share of the living expenses, Morihito hands him a flyer from an amusement park hiring performers for a superhero show.

title: Dear Kara / New Friends / Date with the Knight
overview: Nico and Morihito's classmate Kara asks them to restore a letter from her deceased mother, which her father put through a paper shredder.

title: Trope-tacular Student Council / A Stray Cat’s Bubble of Bliss
overview: After a student council vice president makes a dramatic entrance to forbid Nico from using magic, the council’s other larger-than-life members arrive.

title: Dogs and Raindrops (1)
overview: Kanshi saves Keigo from a bully who claims to be using a candy with a stimulant effect. A self-proclaimed witch appears before Nico and Morihito.

title: Dogs and Raindrops (2)
overview: A transformed Keigo attacks the isolated Morihito. Surrounded by Wolf's "Dogs," Kanshi and Nico devise a plan to locate and neutralize the warlock.

title: Keigo Magami, the Werewolf / Kind Tiger, Proud Wolf / Easy Spices for Enthralling Cooking
overview: Morihito and the others decide to get rid of any crescent-shaped objects to minimize the risk of Keigo transforming into a werewolf in the house.

title: Uron Mirage Chapter 119: The Phasey Hunt, Part 4 / Diary of My Favorite Artist
overview: In Episode 119 of Uron Mirage, swordsmen Utsuro, Oboro, Sagiri and Zack decide to split up and search the buildings of an abandoned research facility.

title: Summer Demon
overview: Ibuki's newest prophecy advises seeking a family that dispels evil. Nico and her friends set out in search, treating the journey like a summer trip.

title: Miharu Kiryu, the Vampire / Missing Parasol / I'm So Glad You're Here
overview: Vampire Miharu moves into the Otogi house, but as a night person with different energy needs, he may struggle to adjust to communal living.

title: We Got Trapped in a Death Game, But It Sucked / Long Long a Go Go
overview: Morihito and the other guys awake in an unknown place. A mysterious figure tells them they must play a game — and that Nico is being held hostage.

title: Kara and Shiki / Mega Marble Mania Madness / Scramble Scrap Squad
overview: Nico and Kukumi help Kara out at the shrine run by her father. When Nico casts a spell to make a paper cat move around, Kara gets an idea.

title: Letter from a Friend
overview: When tidying the house, Morihito finds a letter Nico wrote to him when they were kids. Nico shares her memories of those days with Nemu and the guys.

title: The Lost Wolf and the Stray Cat
overview: Noticing that Keigo seems sad, Nico gives him a ring imbued with a levitation spell. As he secretly trains to use it, Nemu approaches him.

title: Secret Urges / Keiko's Carefree Style / Jekyll Visits the Otogi House
overview: As Keigo wonders why his channel isn't getting more views, Nico casts a spell on him that she believes will help make his videos more interesting.

title: The Incredible Shrinking Adventure / The Hamazaki Fall Bread Festival / Lucky Birthday
overview: While sharing donuts with Kara and Morihito, Nico decides to shrink herself and Morihito down so they can experience eating a giant pastry.

title: Our First Offline Meetup / Fave Artist File: Creative Surge / Fave Artist File: Crazy Event Arc
overview: When Kukumi mentions that she will be meeting a friend from social media in person for the first time, a worried Ms. Makuwa decides to tail her.

title: Moi’s Denim Devotion / Date With the Guide
overview: When Morihito declares it's time to give his favorite pair of jeans a second wash, Miharu asks to know more about denim — much to the others' chagrin.

title: Freshman Witch and Her Familiars
overview: Needing an attraction for the upcoming school festival, Nico's class decides to use her quirky spells to run a café with a spooky theme.
